description_long: This is a rectangular, hard-shell suitcase with a smooth, light gray surface framed by black edges. The suitcase features a single, sturdy top handle in black, centrally positioned for balanced carrying. Two small, rectangular latches are visible on the top surface, likely serving as the primary locking mechanism. The overall design is minimalist, with no visible external pockets, wheels, or decorative elements. The surface appears to be made of a rigid material, possibly plastic or metal, with a matte finish. There are no visible brand logos or emblems on any side of the suitcase.
description: A rectangular, hard-shell suitcase with a smooth gray body, black frame, and a single top handle. It features two latches on top and a minimalist, pocketless design.
description_view_0: Narrow end view showing the black-framed edge and the top handle and latches in silhouette.
description_view_1: Wide side view displaying the full rectangular face, top handle, and two latches, with no visible pockets or wheels.
description_view_2: Opposite narrow end view, similar to view 0, showing the black-framed edge and top handle from the other side.
description_view_3: Wide side view nearly identical to view 1, showing the full face, handle, and latches.
